name: Open Weave LED Medium Outdoor Lantern Beige - Threshold™
description:
Elevate your patio or pathway lighting with this Open-Weave LED Medium Outdoor Lantern from Threshold™. Made from metal and resin, this beige-color outdoor lantern features an open-weave design in an oval shape and is equipped with a bright LED bulb. Solar/battery powered, it has a base slide switch and also features convenient, automated dusk on/dawn off settings.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
